Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Talk about saving the best for last! Now that's what I'm talkin' about![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh man, this is insane. If we nail this, it'll blow our failures out of the water.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}How 'bout this time, we try goin' one by one instead of all together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Okay, then let's decide the order! We'll go clockwise, starting with the winner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Okay, I'll go first, Sanada-san is second, and you'll go last.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Uh, hey... I noticed you've been, uh, starin' at the ocean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Er, um... I was just wondering if you'd be down to talk. If you're not busy, that is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I mean, it's more fun than standing here all by yourself, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Wow, you got shot down faster than I expected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Oh, uh, yeah. I mean, I like the ocean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You know, I heard something interesting about triathletes who train at indoor pools.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Apparently, they get outperformed by athletes who train in the ocean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Heh, well, I won. I talked to her longer than you did.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}It doesn't matter how long you talked to her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Hey, don't cry! You're making me feel bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}If you can't pull this off, I'm gonna be traumatized for the rest of my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}We're on the ropes, but it's not over yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}But she looks surprised. We should go over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 204 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Initiating evasive maneuver. Confirmation must be made at a secure location...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Hey, what did you say to make her run away like that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Well, what're you waiting for? Go after her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}This could turn into serious trouble! You gotta go tell her you're sorry![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}If you don't, we'll get all the blame! Go on, you can catch her if you hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to follow the[n]girl into the forest.[n]{f 1 1}
